title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers outlines five production best practices for deploying TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost budgets via lifecycle hooks, and observability through metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. The video demonstrates these patterns using the Strands Agents SDK on AWS infrastructure.
